Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like this door leads[n]to the swimming pool.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An indoor pool is such a luxury. I wonder[n]if you can swim in the winter too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2063 0 0}Look, we even have an indoor pool! Only the swim team uses it, though.[n]{f 1 1}
